# openMCP

> Cross-post CLI + audit engine — feeds the GEO/AEO loop.
> Open. Transparent. Governed.

## Key facts

- **Domain:** openMCP
- **Tier:** infra
- **MCP endpoint:** https://openMCP/mcp (streamable-HTTP, MCP 1.27.2)
- **A2A Agent Card:** https://openMCP/.well-known/agent-card.json
- **Open source:** https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/openMCP-hive (MIT)
- **Pricing (x402 micro-call):** Free
- **Pricing (SaaS tier):** Freemium
- **Memory mode:** shared
- **Knowledge subgraph scope:** MCP server directory listings, audit scores, cross-post runs

## Tools exposed (MCP)

- openMCP

## Cross-hive integrations

- openmoe.ai (audit target)
- meok.ai (audit target)

## Brand

- **Palette:** audit green + transport blue
- **Voice:** Librarian, audit-first, byte-identical. Speaks in scorecards and rank.

## Sources

- Hive architecture: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/meok-compliance-gateway/blob/main/FLEET_BASE.md
- Global strategy: see the MEOK memory file meok-global-strategy-2026-06-07
- Crown jewels: see the MEOK memory file meok-crown-jewels-2026-06-07
- GEO strategy: see the MEOK memory file meok-geo-strategy-2026-06-07
